    Detailed text metrics using Canvas API.
    static void
    SvgGraphicsTeaVM.initMeasureCanvas()
    Initializes the shared canvas for text measurement.
    static double[]
    SvgGraphicsTeaVM.measureTextCanvas(String text, String fontFamily, int fontSize, String fontWeight)
    Measures text dimensions using Canvas API (optimized with shared canvas).
    static double[]
    SvgGraphicsTeaVM.measureTextCanvasNoCache(String text, String fontFamily, int fontSize, String fontWeight)
    Measures text dimensions using Canvas API (creates new canvas each time).
    static double[]
    SvgGraphicsTeaVM.measureTextSvgBBox(String text, String fontFamily, int fontSize)
    Measures text using SVG getBBox() method.
    static String
    SvgGraphicsTeaVM.serializeToString(Element element)
    Returns the SVG as a string (serialized XML).
